zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Montgomery於大約1380年出生在英國德比夏爾時，她的父親Nicholas Montgomery Lord of Cubley25歲，母親Margaret Foljambe16歲。她於1392年與Thomas Clarell Sr.在英國英格蘭越可爾加福索普結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1456年3月17日在英國越可爾阿爾德瓦可享年77歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Montgomery于大约1380年出生在英国德比夏爾时，她的父亲Nicholas Montgomery Lord of Cubley25岁，母亲Margaret Foljambe16岁。她于1392年与Thomas Clarell Sr.在英国英格兰越可爾加福索普结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1456年3月17日在英国越可爾阿爾德瓦可享年77岁，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Montgomery was born about 1380, in Derbyshire, England, her father, Nicholas Montgomery Lord of Cubley, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Foljambe, was 16. She married Thomas Clarell Sr. in 1392, in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 17 March 1456, in Aldwarke, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Montgomery est née environ 1380, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Montgomery Lord of Cubley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Foljambe, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Clarell Sr. en 1392, à Gawthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 mars 1456, à Aldwarke, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Everwyck, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1392 in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Clarell Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Montgomeryが約1380年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Nicholas Montgomery Lord of Cubleyは25歳，母Margaret Foljambeは16歳であった。1392年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアガウソルペでThomas Clarell Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1456年3月17日にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルドワークで77歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Montgomery(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Montgomery Lord of Cubley(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Foljambe(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 가w소에서 Thomas Clarell Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 3월 17일 영국 요르크실르 알드워크에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Clarell Sr. em 1392, em Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de março de 1456, em Aldwarke, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Aldwark, Yorkshire, England: Aldwark, North Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Montgomery родилась около 1380 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Montgomery Lord of Cubley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Foljambe, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Clarell Sr. в 1392 г. в местности гавтаурп, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 17 марта 1456 г. в местности алдварк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности еркшир, Англия.
